creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Not approved, in fact. 

Dear submitter, would you send a new patch in here (bug-followup@FreeBSD.org)? 
The last one you sent went straight to the mailing list, avoiding being copied 
in here.  Also, why you dropped the USE_RC_SUBR thing? That was clear 
improvement in the first patch.
